notableEvents.label: Junior Caminero GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Junior Caminero grounds into a double play, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ketel Marte to first baseman LuJames Groover. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Junior Caminero out at 1st.
